statement.p: Serenity invested a total of {\$4{,}800} in two investments. Her savings account pays {2\%} interest annually. A riskier stock investment lost {5.5\%} at the end of the year. At the end of the year, Serenitys total fell from {\$4{,}800} to {\$4{,}599}\text{.} How much money did she invest in each account?
